title: chionochloa rigida
intro: Chionochloa rigida, also known as the mountain tussock, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chionochloa rigida are said to include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Chionochloa rigida is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
